Providing text equivalents for non-text media objects: All non-text media objects, such as graphical images or video, should be provided with alternative equivalent textual descriptions and/or with equivalent text-based functionality.
Making navigation self-descriptive: Navigation should be designed to help users understand where they are, where they have been and where they can go next.

Showing users where they are: Each presentation segment (page or window) should provide the user with a clear and sufficient indication of where he or she is in the navigation structure and of the current segment position with respect to the overall structure.
Offering alternative access paths: Alternative access paths for navigating to a specific unit of content should be offered to support different navigation strategies.

Minimizing navigation effort: The number of navigation steps needed to reach a certain piece of content should be minimized as long as different mental models, navigation strategies and tasks of the user are taken into account.

validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement faithfully restates all the elements defined in the PDS, preserving all critical details.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: Before the claim entry the user should check the form manually to understand whether any mandatory information is missed in the Claim or not.
validator_match_examples.generated_requirement: Before claim entry, the user must manually check the form to determine if any mandatory information is missing.
validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement faithfully covers the source, preserving all critical details about the user's manual check for missing mandatory information before claim entry.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: If yes, then the user should mark that Claim (Treatment Form) status as Rejected and send back to VSP.
validator_match_examples.generated_requirement: The user must be able to mark a Claim (Treatment Form) status as 'Rejected' and send it back to the VSP if mandatory information is missing.
validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement faithfully covers the source, explicitly incorporating the implied condition ("if mandatory information is missing") and preserving all critical details about marking a claim as 'Rejected' and returning it to the VSP.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: The values of Health Sub – District, Locality, Level Of Facility, Type of facility, Registration Body would be list from their own master and should select the details based on the VSP.

validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement faithfully describes the selection of specific values from master lists based on VSP, preserving all critical details.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: While entering the No of vouchers required, the system should automatically pick the Batch No’s with voucher No’s from the available voucher stock and list the details of each voucher with below information’s as a grid format.
validator_match_examples.generated_requirement: When the number of required vouchers is entered, the system must automatically allocate the relevant vouchers with their numbers and batch numbers from available stock and list the details in a grid format.
validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement faithfully describes the system's automatic allocation and listing of voucher details in a grid format.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: Claim (Treatment Form) Submission Depends on the payment terms (Bi-monthly / Monthly) mentioned in the VSP master the VSP should submit the Claim (Treatment form) to the MISU Field office.
validator_match_examples.generated_requirement: The VSP must submit claims (Treatment Forms) on a bi-monthly or monthly basis, depending on the payment terms specified in the VSP master.
validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement accurately captures the core business rule for claim submission frequency based on payment terms from the VSP master, preserving all critical details.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: The system should have a provision to capture the reason suppose if the claim status is “Rejection or Quarantine” Claim Amount – The calculation of claim amount is explained below.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: If the claim from same VSP having more than two times of Thump Impression mismatching, then the system should automatically produce a warning message and the same time the system should In-Activate the VSP.

validator_match_examples.reason: The generated requirement faithfully covers all critical details of the source, including the condition for the warning and inactivation, and the actions to be taken. The modality is strengthened from 'should' to 'must' but the functionality remains the same.

validator_match_examples.source_requirement: VSP Name Staff Code Staff Name Staff Type Qualification The system will generate message while creating a new staff with existing name, but the system will allow the user to save that new staff if its required.
